chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1276 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 05-09-2023 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner, no intimation received. The dispute appears to be between the petitioner and respondent No.7 over occupation of the land which is purely of civil nature and cannot be entertained in constitutional petition in any case. No one is present on behalf of the petitioner. This petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
